title: (ATS) All The Stuff In The Skies
description: A Modpack which tries to imitate All The Mods but with some extra Flavor
body:

# A modpack that tries to imitate (ATM) All The Mods with a some extra Flavor.
![Modded Sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c3b7cc884a4aaafd49c1fb024c888fdfa12bedb.png)

Note: At the moment when wither skeletons hit you you'll get kicked from the world when rejoining without restarting the game all entities including yourself will be invisible. THIS WILL BE FIXED NEXT UPDATE (The mod causing this Is The [MmmMmmMmmMmm](https://modrinth.com/mod/mmmmmmmmmmmm) Mod)

The Modpack Features mods like:

- Farmers Delight with addons
- Embedium & co. for performance
- Mekanism
- Create 6.0
- Applied Energistics 2
- Everlasting Abilities 
- Galosphere
- Hardcore Revival
- and many more

With All The Stuff you'll never need to miss out on anything.

Is it a fun multiplayer experience you want, play ATS,
Is it Fun and Engaging gameplay you want, play ATS
